DbConnectorOnCvm.__init__c
Get all host pool and hosts in every pool
        Example return values:
        [
            {'host_pool_name': 'ocfs2-pool',
             'host_pool_id': '1',
             'hosts': [
                          {'ip': '10.125.33.96', 'name': 'wxbcvknode96'},
                          {'ip': '10.125.33.97', 'name': 'wxbcvknode97'}
                      ]
            },
            {'host_pool_name': 'ocfs2-pool-1',
             'host_pool_id': '2',
             'hosts': [
                          {'ip': '10.125.33.98', 'name': 'wxbcvknode98'}
                      ]
            }
        ]
